description: Create a Splunk alert named 'Brute_Force_Detection' at http://localhost:8000 (Credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!) that triggers when more than 5 failed SSH login attempts occur from the same source IP within a 5-minute window. Use the search query: index=security_logs "Failed password" | stats count by src_ip | where count > 5. The alert must use a cron schedule of */5 * * * * and trigger when the number of results is greater than 0.
